creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
A patch has been proposed in Phabricator D24195, to unbreak math/sage and to upgrade it to 9.1: please see

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D24195

The patch is available at:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/file/data/7n5ygnaovsmtapeywzwj/PHID-FILE-l7r4tsl2qnwuudpbmcmk/D24195.diff
